chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appl. No.D-31 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 25.09.2024 Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General **************** Learned counsel for the applicant contends that alleged detainees have since been surfaced and recovered, as such matter requires to be disposed of as not pressed. Whereas, report submitted by the official respondents reflects that detainees are involved in the offences and some of the detainees have obtained bail from the concerned Court of law. Since, the purpose of filling of present Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands served. Accordingly, same stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali/steno*
